Description.value: Pure XML inventory layer for a 91-slot backpack. Lowers initial CarryCapacity 27 to 12, expands BagSize to 91 (UI grid 7x13), makes 20 over-capacity slots nearly immobilizing, and rescales Black Wolf Pack Mule pocket bonuses for this larger bag. No extra backpack mod, no DLL, no Harmony, EAC compatible.
